notableEvents.label: Cam Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Carlos Correa out at 2nd. Cam Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Allen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Allen grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Taylor Trammell scores. Yainer Diaz out at 2nd. Nick Allen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Joey Loperfido pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Loperfido singles on a ground ball to shortstop J.P. Crawford.
